translations.vi: Phần thưởng sẽ đến vào ngày mai.
translations.ja: ご褒美は明日届きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular; introduces the known/specific noun 'récompense'.
Common noun, feminine; head of the noun phrase serving as subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; predicate of the clause.
Temporal adverb; modifies the verb to indicate time.

sentences.target: J'attends ma récompense depuis deux semaines.

translations.fr: J'attends ma récompense depuis deux semaines.
translations.en: I've been waiting for my reward for two weeks.
translations.es: Llevo esperando mi recompensa desde hace dos semanas.
translations.de: Ich warte seit zwei Wochen auf meine Belohnung.
translations.it: Aspetto la mia ricompensa da due settimane.
translations.ko: 나는 내 보상을 두 주 동안 기다려 왔어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我已经等我的奖品两周了。
translations.yue: 我等我嘅獎品等咗兩個星期。
translations.ru: Я жду свою награду уже две недели.
translations.pt: Estou esperando minha recompensa há duas semanas.
translations.he: אני מחכה לפרס שלי כבר שבועיים.
translations.vi: Tôi đã chờ phần thưởng của mình suốt hai tuần.
translations.nl: Ik wacht al twee weken op mijn beloning.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на свою нагороду вже два тижні.
translations.hu: Már két hete várom a jutalmamat.
translations.hi: मैं अपने इनाम का दो हफ्ते से इंतजार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam na swoją nagrodę od dwóch tygodni.
translations.el: Περιμένω την ανταμοιβή μου εδώ και δύο εβδομάδες.
translations.nb: Jeg har ventet på belønningen min i to uker.
translations.id: Aku sudah menunggu hadiahku selama dua minggu.
translations.sv: Jag har väntat på min belöning i två veckor.
translations.ro: Aștept recompensa mea de două săptămâni.
translations.cs: Na svou odměnu čekám už dva týdny.
translations.da: Jeg har ventet på min belønning i to uger.
translations.fi: Olen odottanut palkintoani kahden viikon ajan.
translations.ja: ご褒美を二週間ずっと待っています。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun contracted before a vowel-initial verb; 1st person singular subject.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; expresses the ongoing action.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; feminine singular agreeing with 'récompense'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'attends'.
Preposition marking ongoing duration; heads the prepositional phrase 'depuis deux semaines'.
Cardinal numeral; quantifies 'semaines'.
Common noun, feminine plural; complement of 'depuis' indicating the time span.

sentences.target: Tu mérites une récompense pour ton aide.
sentences.reading: /ty meʁit yn ʁekɔ̃pɑ̃s puʁ tɔ̃ ɛd/

translations.fr: Tu mérites une récompense pour ton aide.
translations.ipa: /ty meʁit yn ʁekɔ̃pɑ̃s puʁ tɔ̃ ɛd/
translations.en: You deserve a reward for your help.
translations.es: Te mereces una recompensa por tu ayuda.
translations.de: Du verdienst eine Belohnung für deine Hilfe.
translations.it: Meriti una ricompensa per il tuo aiuto.
translations.ko: 너는 도움을 줘서 보상을 받을 자격이 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你帮了忙，值得一份奖品。
translations.yue: 你幫咗手，值得一份獎品。
translations.ru: Ты заслуживаешь награду за свою помощь.
translations.pt: Você merece uma recompensa pela sua ajuda.
translations.he: מגיע לך פרס על העזרה שלך.
translations.tr: Yardımın için bir ödülü hak ediyorsun.
translations.vi: Bạn xứng đáng nhận phần thưởng vì sự giúp đỡ của mình.
translations.nl: Je verdient een beloning voor je hulp.
translations.uk: Ти заслуговуєш на нагороду за свою допомогу.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी मदद के लिए तुम इनाम के हकदार हो.
translations.pl: Zasługujesz na nagrodę za swoją pomoc.
translations.el: Αξίζεις μια ανταμοιβή για τη βοήθειά σου.
translations.nb: Du fortjener en belønning for hjelpen din.
translations.id: Kamu pantas mendapatkan hadiah atas bantuanmu.
translations.sv: Du förtjänar en belöning för din hjälp.
translations.ro: Meriți o recompensă pentru ajutorul tău.
translations.cs: Zasloužíš si odměnu za svou pomoc.
translations.da: Du fortjener en belønning for din hjælp.
translations.ja: あなたは手伝ってくれたのでご褒美に値します。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular; subject of 'mérites'.
Main verb, present indicative, 2nd person singular.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; introduces a non-specific 'récompense'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'mérites'.
Preposition expressing purpose/cause; introduces the phrase 'ton aide'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular; used before vowel-initial feminine noun ('aide') to avoid hiatus.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On a enfin trouvé la récompense cachée.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃fɛ̃ tʁuve la ʁekɔ̃pɑ̃s kaʃe/

translations.fr: On a enfin trouvé la récompense cachée.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a ɑ̃fɛ̃ tʁuve la ʁekɔ̃pɑ̃s kaʃe/
translations.en: We finally found the hidden reward.
translations.es: Por fin encontramos la recompensa escondida.
translations.de: Endlich haben wir die versteckte Belohnung gefunden.
translations.it: Abbiamo finalmente trovato la ricompensa nascosta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们终于找到了藏起来的奖品。
translations.yue: 我哋終於搵到藏起嚟嘅獎品。
translations.he: סוף סוף מצאנו את הפרס החבוי.
translations.vi: Cuối cùng chúng tôi đã tìm thấy phần thưởng bị giấu.
translations.nl: We hebben eindelijk de verborgen beloning gevonden.
translations.hi: हमने आखिरकार छिपा हुआ इनाम ढूंढ लिया.
translations.nb: Vi fant endelig den skjulte belønningen.
translations.id: Kami akhirnya menemukan hadiah yang tersembunyi.
translations.sv: Vi hittade äntligen den gömda belöningen.
translations.ro: Am găsit în sfârșit recompensa ascunsă.
translations.da: Vi fandt endelig den skjulte belønning.
translations.ja: 隠されていたご褒美をやっと見つけました。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/collective subject pronoun; often used for 'we' in spoken French.
Auxiliary verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; forms the passé composé with 'trouvé'.
Adverb; adds aspectual/attitudinal nuance indicating relief or conclusion.
Past participle; lexical verb in a compound tense with 'avoir'; no agreement since the direct object follows.
Definite article, feminine singular; introduces 'récompense'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of the verb 'trouvé'.
Adjective (from past participle), feminine singular; modifies 'récompense' and agrees in gender/number.
